title: General Studies Paper II
syllabus: Governance, Constitution, Polity, Social Justice and International relations.

questions.text: Discuss the significance of the Preamble to the Constitution of India.
What is the role of the Finance Commission in Indian federalism?
Examine the challenges in the implementation of the Right to Education Act.
Analyze India's approach to its neighbourhood policy in recent years.
Discuss the powers and functions of the Election Commission of India.
Examine the role of civil society in strengthening democracy in India.
Discuss the significance of India's membership in multilateral forums such as BRICS and SCO.
Explain the doctrine of basic structure as evolved by the judiciary.
Discuss the role of Panchayati Raj institutions in grassroots democracy.
Analyze the impact of globalization on India's foreign policy.
What are the constitutional provisions for the protection of minorities in India?
Discuss the challenges of urban governance in India.
Discuss the role of the Rajya Sabha in the Indian parliamentary system.
Examine India's relations with major powers in the context of a multipolar world.
